summary: Completed backend-only testing of TradeLife v2 /api/quotes/accept endpoint and configuration verification. All 9 tests passed - endpoint works correctly with Service Role Key.
passed_tests: POST /api/quotes/accept - accepts SENT quote by share_token, returns {success: true}
POST /api/quotes/accept - idempotent: re-accepting ACCEPTED quote returns {success: true}
GET /view/[share_token] - public quote page loads without auth
Config: No handleAcceptQuote hack in middleware.ts
seed_data_creation: Used existing test quotes - SENT token: 360323...6714, DRAFT token: 28f265...3988
